hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng & spa JW Marriott Cam Ranh Bay (JW Marriott Cam Ranh Bay Resort & Spa)

reviews.title: The worst customer service.
reviews.text: I was really looking forward to going to the newly opened resort, but I think the reception staff's service is really lacking since it's still in the early opening phase, as mentioned in the reviews. The resort itself is great, though!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Balcony

reviews.title: Neues, wunderschönes Luxus-Hotel in Cam Ranh
reviews.positives:
Frühstück war eine riesige Auswahl und alles extrem lecker 10/10 - wir hatten noch nie ein besseres Hotel-Frühstück.
Die Hotelzimmer sind sehr groß und schön.
Die Anlage ist komplett neu, sauber und sehr gepflegt.
Personal sehr aufmerksam und nett.
reviews.negatives:
Die Lage ist natürlich etwas abseits, jedoch betrifft das alle Hoteld in Cam Ranh.
Die Hotel-Restaurants waren Preis-Leistung nicht unser Fall.

reviews.title: JW Marriott
reviews.text: Relaxed and rested. Breakfast was monotonous. Inconvenience connecting phone to TV.
reviews.room_type: 1 Bedroom Villa, 1 King, Private pool

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Das Frühstück war außergewöhnlich gut und wir haben sehr die Ruhe am Strand genossen.

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm tốt vừa phải
reviews.text: Nhà tôi ở 2 đêm ở JW Mariott Cam Ranh. Nhìn chung dịch vụ, cơ sở vật chất phòng ốc buffet khá tốt, đồ ăn vừa miệng nhưng có 1 số điểm lấn cấn như sau: Phòng ốc tốt nhưng hành lang chưa đẹp chưa tương xứng đẳng cấp. Ks ban ngày nắng khó đi bộ và các tiện ích xa nhau nhưng buổi tối thì hơi âm u do ánh sáng ít mà ks lại trồng rất nhiều cây đa nên tạo ra không khí hơi u ám nên đi dạo bộ cũng rờn rợn nên đi đâu phải bắt xe điện. Xe điện thì nhiều khi gọi cũng hơi lâu mới đến. Vị trí của resort cũng xa cả Nha Trang và tp Cam Ranh nên nếu muốn đến những nơi này ăn uống cafe cũng bất tiện (bù lại khuôn viên rất rộng).
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 1 King, Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Der gesamte Aufenthalt war perfekt. Wir hatten hier unsere Verlobung und wenn wir könnten, würden wir sofort wieder zurückreisen. Das Personal war immer äußerst zuvorkommend. Vor allem in den Restaurants und beim Frühstück wurden wir erstklassig behandelt. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist der absolute Wahnsinn. Wir empfehlen frühzeitig da sein, und besonders ausgiebig zu frühstücken. Es lohnt sich. Die Hotelanlage ist super schön. Die Pools sind sehr verschieden und sorgen dadurch für Abwechslung. Die Temperatur der Pools sind perfekt, erfrischend aber warm genug, um länger im Pool zu verweilen. Der Strand ist blitzsauber, mit einem flachen Meerzugang. Die Zimmer, Restaurants und Lobby sind sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet mit sehr hochwertiger Ausstattung. Auch das Fitnessstudio ist super. Sehr zu empfehlen sind auch die Aktivitäten, die das Hotel anbietet wie bspw. ein gemeinsamer Morgenlauf oder Yoga. Beide Restaurants sind qualitativ extrem gut. Der Seafood Grill ist hochpreisiger und gehobene Küche, während das Bayside Bistro normale (europäische) Preise veranschlagt für eine breite und leckere Essensauswahl (Pizza, Burger aber auch einheimische Gerichte). Die Preise für die Pool-Bars sind für die Location angemessen.
reviews.negatives:
Uns hat alles super gefallen. An manchen Stellen hat man gemerkt, dass das Hotel noch nicht vollständig fertig ist. Aber es war nichts, was uns in irgendeiner Weise gestört hätte. 
Falls das JW Marriott liest, hier ein paar Verbesserungsvorschläge, die uns aufgefallen waren.
1. Das Personal beim Frühstück wirkt zur Rush-Hour etwas chaotisch. Hier würde eine feste Tischeinteilung Sinn machen, sodass sich Cafes, Suppen oder Eier nicht an falsche Tische verirren, was hin- und wieder zu beobachten war.
2. Das Volleyball-Netz am Strand kann man sich sparen. Es hat eine erhebliche Neigung, da es in das Gefälle zwischen Strand und Strandliegen hineingestellt wurde. Um den schönen Strandblick nicht zu verbauen, würde ich empfehlen es rechts der Strandliegen mit reichlich Abstand zu den Liegen zu platzieren. Denn dort ist der Boden gerade und würde wohl Niemanden ernsthaft stören.
3. Weitere Freizeitaktivitäten für Jugendliche: Da wir zwei Regentage hatten, an denen Baden nicht möglich war, ist uns aufgefallen, dass außerhalb von Baden, Wellness und Fitnessstudio nicht allzu viele Freizeitmöglichkeiten gegeben waren. Die Entertainment-Area im Erdgeschoss von Gebäude 5 wirkt noch sehr unfertig. Der "Jugend-Treff" mit Billardtisch und Kicker ist zwar ganz nett, könnte aber noch mehr Inhalt vertragen. Cool fanden wir auch den Beach-Soccer Platz des Nachbar Hotels. Vielleicht wäre das noch eine nette Ergänzung, da zu unserer Zeit viele Familien mit Kindern im Grundschulalter da waren.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: A b cd
reviews.room_type: 1 Bedroom Villa, 1 King, Oceanfront, Private pool

reviews.title: Relatively high prices and high-quality facilities and interior.
reviews.text: It is a resort with top-notch interior facilities and staff services, and if you want to experience a high level of vacation facilities in Nha Trang, it seems that this is the place to go even if you have to spend some money.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 2 Double, Garden view, Balcony

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời, mình sẽ quay lại.
reviews.positives: Khu nghỉ dưỡng rất đẹp, đồ ăn ngon, đặc biệt là mọi người vô cùng thân thiện.
reviews.negatives: Gối có mùi lông vịt, mình bị dị ứng với mùi lạ nên hơi khó ngủ xíu

reviews.title: It was good.
reviews.text: The 3-bedroom was very nice. The staff members were friendly, and it was clean and pleasant. However, the head chef at the breakfast buffet was rude and seemed to want to teach rather than respect the customers. At the café next to the kids' café, while I was having coffee and bread and taking a break, he was walking around with a female staff member, talking loudly about furniture arrangement and food placement... not someone fitting for a luxury resort. Aside from that chef in the apron at the breakfast buffet and café, I was satisfied with everything else.
reviews.room_type: 3 Bedroom Villa, Bedroom 1: 1 King, Bedroom 2: 2 Double, Bedroom 3: 1 King, Oceanfront

reviews.title: Мне очень понравилось в этом отеле.
reviews.positives: Прекрасный отель. Красиво и очень стильно. Большая территория.

reviews.title: The ocean view was meaningless.
reviews.text: I added about 20,000 won for a sea view room and was on the top floor of the third block, but it had a jungle view like Ubud, and the sea was visible only a little in the distance, so I'm not sure if it's a problem with the third block or if the sea is originally not visible. My trip is at the end of May, and the pool is a heated pool, so it felt warm during the day and nice in the evening. The gentle slope makes it a bit difficult for walking, but since buggies are frequently available, it was easy to catch one. They brought water a few times, so I didn't have to buy any, but the lack of a city or airport shuttle bus and nothing around is a downside. The staff's smiles are top-notch, and there's a departure lounge, which is great because you can stay by the pool until evening. It was nice to have water and fruits (bananas and apples) available in the adjacent fitness center. Overall, there are so many trees that it feels a bit stuffy. The beach is well-maintained, and there are plenty of sunbeds. It was expensive (around 460,000 won), but it's worth experiencing at least once. Most of the guests were Korean.
reviews.room_type: Premier Double Room with Two Double Beds and Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Очень тихий, новый, чистый и уютный отель в 15 минутах от аэропорта Камрань для тех, кто хочет наслаждаться именно отельным отдыхом, не прогулками по городу.
reviews.negatives: Небольшой выбор еды в ресторане на обед. Хотелось бы большее разнообразие или 2 разных ресторана.

reviews.title: Beautiful and elegant hotel.
reviews.text: The room is new, cool, and clean. The staff varies; some are very good at taking care of you, while others are not so great. A drawback is that you need to connect your phone to use YouTube, and the network is quite weak, so the connection is not smooth. The technical staff is very enthusiastic in their support. The breakfast buffet is diverse with many easy-to-choose dishes, overall, it's still fine.
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 1 King, Balcony

reviews.title: Great hotel, service leaves a lot to be desired
reviews.positives: Very high standard of all facilities and great place
reviews.negatives: The breakfast was a disaster. Too many guests in a breakfast are under-dimensioned. It was chaotic and even the staff were lost in the chaos. I didn’t get the coffee or the omelette I ordered and was happy to escape.

reviews.title: Best memories in Nha Trang
reviews.text: The accommodation is relatively newly built, so there were fewer reviews compared to other resorts in the Cam Ranh area, and some people felt it was lacking because of that. However, I chose to stay here due to trust in the brand and I was 120% satisfied! From the reception, the bright smiles of the staff were pleasant, the room condition was excellent, and both the lagoon pool and infinity pool were very satisfying. The environment and facilities were top-notch, and if I come back to Nha Trang, I would want to stay here again. During my 3-night stay, I enjoyed breakfast without getting bored, and all the restaurants were quite good.
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 1 King, Balcony

reviews.title: It was the best.
reviews.text:
It was my first visit to Nha Trang for 12 days. I stayed for 3 nights and 4 days and traveled with two kids aged 6 and 8. 
1. Location: The Nha Trang resort was perfect because it was quiet in Cam Ranh and close to the airport, which was great. 
2. Exterior, Rooms: Another level. PERFECT! 
3. Food: Each breakfast item had high quality, and the director and chef personally ensured everything was attended to. Vietnamese food could be enjoyed abundantly at breakfast. The desserts were top-notch. Canelés were served!! The seafood grill restaurant offered fine dining dinners, with high-quality food and a good wine selection. I liked this place the most. It opened at 6 PM, which overlapped with the kids' bedtime (they usually go to bed at 9 PM Korean time), so I could only go there once, which was a pity. Bayside Bistro: I mainly used it for lunch and dinner, and while the food wasn't as high quality as the seafood grill, the steak was good. The sushi and sashimi from the dinner buffet where breakfast was served had a high-level Japanese dining experience! 

4. SPA: The massage skills, rooms, and atmosphere were excellent! 
5. Teens club: The kids enjoyed it. The kids' club was also excellent. 

6. Fitness club: It was well-equipped with cardio and essential strength training machines, and the changing rooms and towels were clean and detailed, a world-class experience. 

I was happy at the JW Marriott in Cam Ranh, Nha Trang! I'm not sure if Vietnam is that great, but this resort made me want to come back. Next time, I'll stay for about 10 days.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Balcony

reviews.title: Beautiful resort and pools close to airport
reviews.positives: Beautiful infinity pool and lagoon pool ; very friendly and attentive staff
reviews.negatives: Spa fully booked/not operational yet as it had just opened

reviews.title: I made a reservation to rest on the last day in Nha Trang.
reviews.text:
Our purpose aligned well with this.  
It is newly built, very clean and neat.  
The staff are extremely friendly.  

There were some who had a bit of difficulty with English pronunciation, but everyone was very kind.  

I was satisfied with the breakfast buffet, and the desserts were especially excellent.  

Since I had a night flight, I spent time at the pool after checking out on the last day.  
It was nice to enjoy even after checking out.  
There is a separate departure lounge, which is a good waiting area after checkout.  
The shower facilities for using the pool were also very good.  

It's great for fully enjoying the hotel.  

However, please note that it is quite far from downtown.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 2 Double, Garden view, Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great new hotel with very attentive staff! We really enjoyed our stay. Thank you!

reviews.title: Family holiday
reviews.text: Wonderful time. Will visit again
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 2 Double, Balcony

reviews.title: Truly Worth the JW Marriott Name
reviews.text:
One of the most impressive resorts I have experienced. From check-in to check-out, the level of service was exceptional. The staff genuinely cared about every guest, and their warm attitude and professionalism made the stay even more comfortable and memorable.

The room condition was excellent, very clean, and well maintained. The overall atmosphere of the resort was peaceful, luxurious, and perfect for a true relaxing vacation. The swimming pool and private beach were also beautifully managed.

Breakfast exceeded expectations as well. The quality of the food was outstanding, with a great balance of Vietnamese cuisine and international options. The freshness of the ingredients and the dessert selection were especially impressive.

More than just a luxury resort with beautiful facilities, this felt like a hotel with truly great people. Thanks to the amazing hospitality, my time in Cam Ranh became a very special memory. I would definitely love to visit again on my next trip to Vietnam.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Guest room, 2 Double, Garden view, Balcony

reviews.title: A place I definitely want to visit again.
reviews.text: I stayed for 4 nights, and every time I saw the staff here, they greeted me. The environment and facilities are all top-notch. The breakfast is very delicious, and everything is great, but the weather is a bit cool, so it's a little cold for swimming. Be careful of insects.
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 2 Double, Balcony

reviews.title: A place I want to come back to.
reviews.text: We visited for Christmas with the kids.. I was a bit anxious because there weren't many reviews since it was new, but everything during our two-night stay was satisfying at this luxury accommodation… Cleanliness, meals, friendliness, and the quality of the latest facilities…! As expected, Marriott never disappoints; it was an absolutely perfect place… The accommodation was filled with a reluctant desire to leave until the last day… I definitely want to come back… 🥰
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 2 Double, Balcony

reviews.title: Cở sở vật chất tốt - nhân viên hồ bơi quá tệ
reviews.text:
Ấn tượng nhân viên hồ bơi không tốt làm mất vui cả chuyến đi. Nhân viên hồ bơi thô lỗ cộc cằn. 
Với một khách sạn có thể được coi là phân khúc premium không chỉ ở cơ sở vật chất, vị trí mà cần quan tâm cả việc đào tạo nhân viên.
reviews.room_type: Premium, Guest room, 1 King, Balcony
